title: Incident DB verification — live DB path, index state, duplicate open rows, post-containment duplicate behavior
objective: Verification-only first, cleanup second only if verification proves it is safe. Prove the live DB path/schema/index state, determine whether duplicate open rows currently exist, whether those rows should already be resolved, and whether new duplicates are still occurring after containment. No production code changes.
verification_targets: exact live DB file path in use by remaining active stack
whether trades table has the expected unique open-slug protection index
whether duplicate open rows currently exist for the same market_slug
whether duplicate open rows are still actually open or should already be resolved/closed
whether the remaining live stack is still writing new duplicates after containment
rules: cleanup only if explicitly proven safe
if DB inspection requires a helper script, it must be visible, plain, and read-only
